bullets.text: The US president announced a halt to a planned US attack on Iran, stating that "serious negotiations are now taking place."
An Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo has resulted in at least 100 deaths, with the World Health Organization declaring it an international emergency.
The death toll from Israeli strikes on Lebanon has surpassed 3,000, marking a significant milestone in the ongoing conflict between Israel and Hezbollah, despite a nominal ceasefire.
The National Trust South Australia faces an inquiry motion amid a $230,000 property dispute, as another branch goes public with financial concerns.
A man has been charged with murder after the bodies of a woman and two children were discovered inside a Sydney home in Campbelltown.
Business owners are creating AI-generated memes of Prime Minister Anthony Albanese in response to a new budget measure, humorously referring to him as their "new business partner."

NextEra Energy Inc. is set to acquire Dominion Energy Inc. for approximately $67 billion, creating the largest power utility in the US and expanding its reach from Florida to artificial intelligence data centers.
Mortgage costs have seen a sharp increase in North America and Europe, despite central banks maintaining steady interest rates, a development attributed to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.
Foreign holdings of US Treasuries decreased in March, as international investors divested from bills while simultaneously increasing their investments in longer-dated federal securities.
